title: Traveling with Kyle - Brazil Part 5 - Salvador, Belem, Boat ride up Amazon

transcript.text: Okay so I think I was in Salvador de la Bahia last time so yeah I took the bus
Across Salvador de Bahia back to the bus station one weird thing about Brazil is
The bus station in Brazil is always on the edge of town like on the other side
Of is like where the cheap hotels were in the center of town so like you have to
Take the bus like miles and miles and miles and miles to the hotel whereas
Anywhere else the bus leaf is off like right there in town next to where the
Hotels are you can like walk there but that's just I guess a testament to how
Huge the cities in Brazil are and they're not like spread out like LA where
Everybody has a big front lawn they're just big um but I think they're a
Little bit more spread up and like Chile or Argentina I can't remember but uh yeah
So I but the hotel that was in that town was pretty remember the name of the town
Then I took a bus up to some other town I can't remember what that's called it was
The one that I was at before um the lamb maybe it's the one that's the farthest
East but it was interesting place because it was like right on some inlet
From the ocean like where a river let in or something had like a big bay and like I
Remember I took a photo I looked at it from the town and it's this huge bay where
You can see the other side like hundreds and hundreds of meters off maybe a mile
It was like a mile away the other side and it was totally dry like you could get
Down there and walk around in the mud or dry mud it looked like and I guess the
Tide was just down so I guess like uh it doesn't uh it's not it's like really
Shallow water and when the tide comes in it's something like a foot deep or
Something um so um but that had a really cool downtown area man I should have
Brought my little my book with me to see what town we're talking about here but it
Had a cool downtown area like a little pedestrian area there and I got a cool
Hotel there there's this girl with information places hang on I've got these really long hands
With a guitar anyways um and then I took the bus into Belém and Belém is a really
Interesting place Belém is the town that's at the mouth of the Amazon River as it as it
As it um opens out into the ocean the Amazon River if you look at it from a
Satellite photo where it opens out into the ocean it pushes debris organic matter
From the Amazon ocean from the Amazon River out into the ocean like 300 miles or
Something so you can actually see this big mushroom plume of of like brown just
Getting pushed way up in the ocean and um yeah the Amazon River is huge but uh so I was
Gonna take the boat ride up the Amazon River to Manaus but uh like I had to wait
Like two or three days or something um so I think I got uh actually I don't recall any
Hotels there that I stayed so I think I stayed on the boat I mean you wanted to
Stay on the boat get the ticket two days advance anyways because um the boat gets
Really crowded and it's really cool the way that people hang out on the boat because
The boat ride was six days so you sleep on the boat um but it's like really basic boat
It's just this boat that's like I don't know how long it is 50 meters long they're not very
Big boats and um like you don't go downstairs at all I think that's where the workers hang
Out or whatever so it's just this boat with like one bathroom or maybe two bathrooms with
The shower and the bottom and um and then like there's this ground level that's just
You know just just steel so you have to go in there and uh put up your hammock so I bought
A hammock and I got there early so I strung up my hammock really high right in the middle
So that I could put my backpack in it and nobody would be able to look in and you know get an
Idea to stand my backpack or and I could be hanging I could be higher than everybody so I could
Have like privacy and stuff and uh it was kind of difficult when I had to when I was to actually
Get there and leave because I'd have to like crawl under people and over people I took a photo of it
And like these hammocks were so jam-packed together that when you're you know that they're
All like connected you know you can't even swing back and forth because all the hammocks are connected
You know if you swing it'll make the other hammock swing and I mean I think I had a couple
Of hammocks like pretty much directly below me and uh yeah it was pretty crazy but it was
Comfortable to be in my hammock and just hang out in there but uh I hung out in Belém for like two
Days that's another huge city because I remember I took a bus like out to a movie theater to see a
Movie with a couple American kids or an American and a Canadian kid and yeah the bus ride was like
A half hour just to get out there to the movie theater um but uh that's actually like uh I guess
A um um like a colonial city they had this really pretty plaza surrounded by all these gigantic colonial
Buildings you know the big big palace looking buildings with the with the spires then you go
In them and they have the huge you know marbled floors and inside indoor courtyard and the and the
Big wide marble stairs that curl up to the second balcony and I guess it was the residence or something
Remember of the or the office buildings of that you know the administrators of that part of the world
But uh there were like two of those buildings or like all clumped together but it wasn't that was kind
Of like the touristy place there wasn't there weren't any like buildings like office and stuff there
The office buildings are kind of a few blocks away that's kind of how south america is they haven't
Re-gentrified yet but uh the food I remember eating the food there hanging out food was really
Good in belen um oh and they had another plaza though also kind of on the main street I guess the
More modern of the plazas I was hanging out there one day on the on the park bench and this like really
Hot black girl that's huge afro walks by me for like 20 feet and she turns around she runs back to me
She's like you stay with me you stay with me but she had this like spittle and I was like whoa
I was kind of freaked out but I should have but uh yeah I was just hanging out I guess with these
American kids and this canadian kid so then we got back on the uh I think that's all I remember seeing
In belen there wasn't really a whole lot there it's kind of one of these town cities it's pretty big
City they had a couple of cool like indoor pedestrian malls though that I hung out at
Like air conditions and stuff but um yeah so then I got on the boat and uh we did the boat ride and
That was fun because it just goes up the middle of the river it took like a really long time to even
Get to the part where you go up the river or maybe not the river was really wide it was like hundreds of
Meters wide like maybe half mile wide or something and um everybody sleeps in their hammocks on the
First level but then there's a second level on top which is this big flat area where nobody sleeps so
That's where people hang out and you could buy alcohol there was a bar there um but I think I brought
My own alcohol I bought a big bottle of cognac or something because I guess it was a little bit more
Expensive gotten in there or something like that but yeah it was cool you just hang out and they
Played music really loud all day long so it was basically like a party a six-day party and they had
These these showers on the back end of the boat that constantly had water flowing down that they would
Just pump out of the river and then fall down and there were these brazilians there who were drinking
Alcohol and just hanging out in the shower the whole time it's like and they were sharing their booze
With me and they were really happy and just uh yeah just really cheerful um but and then we stopped
At a couple of places we stopped at one place for like a few hours that I went in and and um hiked into
The center of the town and got something to eat and it was like a city you know they had roads and cars
And everything but it's right on the side of the amazon um and I got some weed there too but from some hippie
Dude dreadlock hippie guy I think he was even white brazilian guy I think he was selling like art stuff
Or something it was the worst weed ever in my life though it was like grass it barely got you high
But anyways I was smoking a little bit of that in the bathroom with some other guy on the boat and uh
Yeah but it was funny guys having fun but by the end of the six days
All of the tourists were like pulling their hair out they were not having fun it wasn't their idea
Of a good time I guess I don't know maybe they weren't intrepid travelers or oh whoops I'm out of time
